mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.test_key, t.title, t.description, t.thumbnail_image, t.category, c.display_name AS category_display_name, t.test_type, t.estimated_time, t.status, t.created_by, t.play_count, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM md_tests t LEFT JOIN md_test_category c ON t.category = c.category_name WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.id, t.test_key, t.title, t.description, t.thumbnail_image, t.category, c.display_name AS category_display_name, t.test_type, t.estimated_time, t.status, t.created_by, t.play_count, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM md_tests t LEFT JOIN md_test_category c ON t.category = c.category_name WHERE t.test_key = #{testKey}
mapper.update: UPDATE md_tests SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, thumbnail_image = #{thumbnailImage}, category = #{category}, test_type = #{testType}, estimated_time = #{estimatedTime}, status = #{status}, created_by = #{createdBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM md_tests WHERE test_key = #{testKey}
SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(test_key, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM md_tests WHERE test_key LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')

SELECT id, test_id, question_order, question_text, domain, is_reverse AS `reverse`, is_active AS `active`, created_at, updated_at FROM md_test_questions WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY question_order ASC
SELECT id, test_id, question_order, question_text, domain, is_reverse AS `reverse`, is_active AS `active`, created_at, updated_at FROM md_test_questions WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE md_test_questions SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM md_test_questions WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND is_active = 1
SELECT id, test_id, result_title, result_content, result_image, min_score, max_score, created_at, updated_at FROM md_test_results WHERE test_id = #{testId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE md_tests SET play_count = play_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CONVERT('NORMAL' USING utf8mb4) as type, CAST(t.id AS CHAR) as id, CONVERT(t.test_key USING utf8mb4) as `key`, CONVERT(t.title USING utf8mb4) as title, CONVERT(t.description USING utf8mb4) as description, CONVERT(t.thumbnail_image USING utf8mb4) as thumbnail, CONVERT(NULL USING utf8mb4) as thumbnail2, CONVERT(COALESCE(c.display_name, t.category) USING utf8mb4) as categoryName, t.play_count as playCount, t.created_at as createdAt, (CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), t.created_at) <= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as isNew, 0 as isSpicy FROM md_tests t LEFT JOIN md_test_category c ON t.category = c.category_name WHERE t.status = 'active'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONVERT('BALANCE' USING utf8mb4) as type, CAST(bq.id AS CHAR) as id, CAST(bq.id AS CHAR) as `key`, CONVERT(bq.title USING utf8mb4) as title, CONVERT(bq.title USING utf8mb4) as description, CONVERT(bq.option_1_image_path USING utf8mb4) as thumbnail, CONVERT(bq.option_2_image_path USING utf8mb4) as thumbnail2, CONVERT(COALESCE(c2.display_name, bq.category) USING utf8mb4) as categoryName, bq.total_count as playCount, bq.created_at as createdAt, (CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), bq.created_at) <= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as isNew, bq.is_spicy as isSpicy FROM balance_questions bq LEFT JOIN md_test_category c2 ON bq.category = c2.category_name WHERE bq.status = 'active'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONVERT('EGEN' USING utf8mb4) as type, CAST('egen1' AS CHAR) as id, CONVERT('selectEgenTetoGame' USING utf8mb4) as `key`, CONVERT('에겐테토 성격 검사' USING utf8mb4) as title, CONVERT('나의 본모습을 찾아가는 정밀 성격 분석 테스트' USING utf8mb4) as description, CONVERT('/assets/img/egenTeto/egenTetoMain.png' USING utf8mb4) as thumbnail, CONVERT(NULL USING utf8mb4) as thumbnail2, CONVERT('심리/성격' USING utf8mb4) as categoryName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM egen_teto_test_result) as playCount, CONVERT('2024-01-01 00:00:00' USING utf8mb4) as createdAt, 0 as isNew, 0 as isSpicy FROM DUAL ) combined ORDER BY playCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
